intro: Hakea behrii, also known as the black needlewood, is a species of shrub or small tree native to Western Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported health benefits including the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties.
